$notes: Authoritative enumeration of substrate-mediated kinds for W0 spike. Source-of-truth lineage: (1) architect Design v1.0 inventory; (2) engineer W0 filesystem-grep regenerates this file from current code; (3) architect W1.1 state-tree inspection verifies + augments local-state-only kinds; (4) migration script reads this at runtime + refuses-to-start if any kind in local-state has no entry. Drift between this file and filesystem-grep is a substrate-currency defect; CI drift-check at OQ3 disposition. v1.1 inventory LOCKED at 20 kinds per Design v1.1 §3.4.

kinds.name: Agent
kinds.notes: Sole IEngineerRegistry-mediated kind; sibling to the 11 I*Store-mediated. Architect's Design v1.0 §3.4.1 anchor lists 11 I*Store interfaces — engineer round-2 audit surfaced this as 12th-mediated-kind. Substrate-migration shape: AgentRepository composes HubStorageSubstrate behind unchanged IEngineerRegistry interface (Option Y discipline).

kinds.name: Audit
kinds.notes: createOnly-write pattern (idempotency at create-time per audit-repository.ts:77)

kinds.name: Message

secondary-indexes.notes: DIY secondary index for per-thread message lookup; bug-93 surfaced this as poll-pressure source. Per Design §3.4.2: this index goes away STRUCTURALLY in substrate; replaced by postgres expression-index ON entities ((data->>'threadId')) WHERE kind = 'Message' emitted by SchemaDef reconciler.

kinds.per-entity-logic: Per-thread Mutex locks for sequence-allocation (message-repository.ts:108-124); sheds in substrate via createOnly + retry

kinds.name: PendingAction
kinds.notes: Continuation state (architect's prior 49c08df §3.4 inventory listed 'Continuation' as separate aux kind — VERIFIED NOT separate; it is the 'continuation_required' STATE of pending-action queue-items per pending-action-policy.ts:290)

kinds.name: Proposal
kinds.id-pattern: prop-N (per counter map) / proposal-N (per design table)

kinds.name: Task
kinds.notes: Clarification is an INLINE FIELD on Task (task.clarificationQuestion + task.clarificationAnswer per task-repository.ts grep); NOT a separate kind. Verified.

secondary-indexes.notes: Per-thread message-key index (distinct from messages-thread-index/); substrate-side becomes expression-index

kinds.name: Counter
kinds.notes: Special-case persistence: ONE file at meta/counter.json holding per-counter-domain values (taskCounter, proposalCounter, engineerCounter, threadCounter, notificationCounter, ideaCounter, missionCounter, turnCounter, teleCounter, bugCounter). Substrate-migration shape: TBD architect-judgment — either (a) one substrate entity row per counter-domain (10 rows), OR (b) single substrate entity row with embedded JSON (matches current shape). Flag for architect.

kinds.name: SchemaDef
kinds.notes: Substrate-native kind per Design §2.3; bootstrap-self-referential (SchemaDef-for-SchemaDef seeded first; reconciler reads it + emits its own indexes). Restart-safety verified at W2 via kill-9-between-bootstrap-steps test per Design §2.3 M4 fold-in.

kinds.name: Document
kinds.mediation: IDocumentStore (NEW per mission-83; architect-VERIFIED at W1.1)
kinds.notes: Architect W1.1 inspection VERIFIED: real markdown files at documents/{architecture,planning,specs}/*.md (teles.md / policy-network-v1.md / amp-redesign-handoff.md / etc.). Entity-semantic content (markdown body in data.content; metadata in data.category etc.); NOT static asset. Well within 1.5MB cap. Per Option Y composition: new IDocumentStore in v1 substrate. Note: distinguish from `local-state/architect-context/wisdom/` markdown reference docs which ARE static-asset carve-out (per §3.4.4 v1.1 4th out-of-substrate location).

kinds.name: ArchitectDecision
kinds.mediation: IArchitectDecisionStore (NEW per mission-83 OQ7 decomposition; architect-VERIFIED at W1.1)
kinds.persistence-prefix: (today: local-state/architect-context/decisions.json; substrate: data.decision + data.context + data.timestamp per row)
kinds.notes: Architect W1.1 inspection VERIFIED: decisions.json contains list of {decision, context, timestamp} entries. Per OQ7 disposition (LOCKED at Design v0.2 §3.4.3; ACTIVATED at v1.1 architect-verify): each log-entry becomes one entity-row; append-only semantics preserved by handler-side discipline (no entity-mutation, only entity-add); reconciler-emitted index on (kind, created_at) for chronological ordering.

kinds.name: DirectorHistoryEntry
kinds.mediation: IDirectorHistoryEntryStore (NEW per mission-83 OQ7 decomposition; architect-VERIFIED at W1.1)
kinds.notes: Architect W1.1 inspection VERIFIED: director-history.json contains list of {role, text, ...} entries (director chat archive). Per OQ7 disposition LOCKED-ACTIVATED.

kinds.name: ReviewHistoryEntry
kinds.mediation: IReviewHistoryEntryStore (NEW per mission-83 OQ7 decomposition; architect-VERIFIED at W1.1)
kinds.notes: Architect W1.1 inspection VERIFIED: review-history.json contains list of {taskId, assessment, ...} entries. Per OQ7 disposition LOCKED-ACTIVATED.

kinds.name: ThreadHistoryEntry
kinds.mediation: IThreadHistoryEntryStore (NEW per mission-83 OQ7 EXPANDED 4-kind decomposition; architect W1.1 NEW FINDING)
kinds.persistence-prefix: (today: local-state/architect-context/thread-history.json; substrate: data.threadId + data.title + data.outcome + data.timestamp per row)
kinds.notes: NEW FINDING surfaced at W1.1 architect-side state-tree inspection — NOT in v1.0 inventory. thread-history.json contains archived thread summaries ({threadId, title, outcome, timestamp} entries). Per OQ7 EXPANDED from 3-kind → 4-kind decomposition in v1.1; gets new IThreadHistoryEntryStore per Option Y composition. Bilateral discovery cycle: engineer W0.2 surfaced architect-blind-kind-corrections (5 phantoms); architect W1.1 surfaced engineer-blind-kind addition (1 NEW). Symmetric substrate-currency-discipline application.

kinds.name: RepoEventBridgeCursor
kinds.notes: mission-84 W3 NEW kind per Design v1.1 §2.3 Variant (ii) minimal-SchemaDef — cluster #23 closure (repo-event-bridge cursor substrate-persistence). watchable: false (bookkeeping writes; no consumer needs change-events; pre-resolves F5 future-target probe). No hot fields; opaque JSON body wraps cursor-store.ts's existing data-shape unchanged.

kinds.name: RepoEventBridgeDedupe
kinds.notes: mission-84 W3 NEW kind per Design v1.1 §2.3 Variant (ii) minimal-SchemaDef — cluster #23 closure (repo-event-bridge dedupe LRU substrate-persistence). watchable: false (same rationale as RepoEventBridgeCursor sibling).

kinds.name: Notification
kinds.mediation: Direct write via emitLegacyNotification() helper (hub/src/policy/notification-helpers.ts); no INotificationStore interface (system-emit append-only; helper writes to substrate directly via messageStore-adapter — Notification ARE persisted as separate entities; v1.3-cluster-4-correction premise corrected by W8 production-state audit)
kinds.notes: mission-88 W8 bug-124 cartography-gap fix: Notification RE-ADDED to inventory after v1.3-cluster-4-correction wrongly removed it. Production has 555 Notification rows (psql audit 2026-05-24). v2.1 envelope-shape per W8 Design v1.0: id→envelope.id + metadata.name; timestamp→metadata.createdAt; event→spec.eventType (14-eventType closed-set + 'unknown' fallback); targetRoles→spec.targetRoles; data→spec.payload; status.phase='logged' constant (append-only per Audit precedent). Cascade-provenance per W8 Q2: REQUIRED thread-sourced eventTypes (thread_message/thread_converged/turn_created) carry metadata.sourceThreadId; OPTIONAL eventTypes (idea_submitted/proposal_submitted/proposal_decided/mission_created) inject if data.threadId present.

kinds-explicitly-not-included.name: Notification
kinds-explicitly-not-included.v2.1-w8-correction: RE-INSTATED to kinds[] inventory at v2.1 (see kinds[] entry above). v1.3-cluster-4-correction premise was WRONG: emitLegacyNotification IS a Message-emit wrapper BUT ALSO writes Notification entities as separate substrate rows (dual-write pattern not single-replacement). W8 production-state psql audit found 555 Notification rows — disposition (i) at v1.3 was based on incomplete code-trace.
kinds-explicitly-not-included.design-v1.1-listing: Listed at kinds[] entry (line 142-150 pre-v1.3); marked for mission-83 OQ8 re-introduction
kinds-explicitly-not-included.v1.3-cluster-4-correction-superseded:
ENGINEER-CODE-TRACE CONTRADICTED v1.1 PREMISE — mission-56 W5 IS fully complete; notifications ARE first-class Message entities. Evidence:
  (a) hub/src/policy/notification-helpers.ts:112 — emitLegacyNotification() body literally calls messageStore.createMessage({kind: "external-injection", authorRole: "system", authorAgentId: "hub", target: null, delivery: "push-immediate", payload})
  (b) hub/src/hub-networking.ts:466 — await emitLegacyNotification(this.messageStore, event, augmentedData, targetRoles) invokes the messageStore-write path; line 467 log [Notify] Persisted notif-${notification.id} carries a Message id (notif- prefix is legacy log-grep compat)
  (c) grep -nE 'writeFile|writeFileSync|notifications/' hub/src/hub-networking.ts returns zero matches
  (d) grep -rnE 'notifications/notif' hub/src returns zero matches in production code
  No INotificationStore-gap to close; no direct-write path to re-mediate.
kinds-explicitly-not-included.disposition: SUPERSEDED by v2.1 W8 correction (kinds[] entry above).

kinds-explicitly-not-included.name: DirectorNotification
kinds-explicitly-not-included.design-v0.2-listing: ADDED at architect's 49c08df §3.4 refinement; persistence path director-notifications/dn-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN
kinds-explicitly-not-included.w0-verify-finding:
ARCHITECT-BLIND-KIND-CORRECTION — DirectorNotification is FULLY MIGRATED to Message store (mission-56 W5 cleanup ACTUALLY completed for DirectorNotification, unlike Notification). Verified via:
  (a) hub/src/policy/director-notification-helpers.ts:5-8 — 'Cut-over (no dual-write): write-paths emit Messages instead of DirectorNotifications'
  (b) emitDirectorNotification() is a Message-emit wrapper (kind='note'), NOT a separate file-writer
  (c) hub/src/entities/counter.ts:51 — 'Mission-56 W5: DirectorNotification entity removed'
  No notifications-style direct-writes remain. DirectorNotification is NOT a separate substrate kind.
kinds-explicitly-not-included.disposition: REMOVE from Design v0.2 §3.4.1 inventory in Design v1.1 (architect-judgment finalize). Triggers Design v1.1 per Design §3.4 'architect-blind kind discovery' clause.
